channel.title: Ola Kelly Ideas
channel.description: Essays, frameworks, and reflections on leadership as stewardship.

item.title: Leadership Is Stewardship
item.description: Leadership isn’t about taking on more—it’s about carrying responsibility well. This piece introduces stewardship as a practical lens for making better leadership decisions around capacity, trade-offs, (4 min read, 784 words)

item.title: What 'Done' Actually Means in Stewardship
item.description: In stewardship, done is not the moment work looks impressive. It is the moment responsibility has been carried to a faithful, sustainable finish. (2 min read, 262 words)

item.title: The Cost of a Quick Yes
item.description: A fast yes can feel responsive, generous, and strategic. It can also conceal the trade-offs you have not yet named. (1 min read, 219 words)

item.title: When Capacity Is the Leadership Issue
item.description: Leadership problems are not always failures of vision. Sometimes the issue is capacity that has been stretched past what careful stewardship can sustain. (2 min read, 228 words)
